name: au-tax-return
description: Australian tax return assistant. Scans Gmail for receipts, identifies work-related deductions using ATO rules, and produces a complete folder ready to send to your accountant. If you have rental or investment properties, also identifies property income and expenses including Division 40 plant & equipment, Division 43 capital works, borrowing costs, and cost base records for CGT. Includes industry-specific guidance starting with IT/tech, with community-contributed industry guides.
